creator: empty.japan
caption:
One trip to Japan is never enough...

Even after years of living here, I’m still discovering spots where you can truly immerse yourself in the unique and charming Japan.

Every journey, especially with @allnipponairways , reveals something incredible.

Do you agree, or do you think one trip is enough to experience all that Japan has to offer?

It’s been great exploring these places as an #ANAambassador and being able to share my recommendations with @karl_shakur 

See the comments for the list of spots.
